Contact

I welcome messages from students, collaborators, and readers. The best way to reach me is by email; I try to reply within a few days.

  • Email elena.voss@example.edu
  • Office Institute for Mathematical Sciences, Room 412
  • Office hours Wednesdays, 14:00–16:00 (term time)
  • Preprints arXiv · ORCID

For media or speaking requests, please include a sentence or two about the topic and your deadline so I can respond usefully.
